itemListElement.reviewBody:
Each time I raised  a concern regarding my child's well being  the response disproportionately reflected negative feedback about my child rather than a constructive resolution of the issue. On one occasion, he was withdrawn  from annual function performance without prior communication, which was deeply unsettling. 
Such actions can undermine a child's emotional  security and sense of belonging. Educational institutions must respond to parental concerns with fairness, transparency, and sensitivity to child's vulnerability.

Prometheus School truly stands out with its state-of-the-art facilities and commitment to holistic growth. From an Olympic-sized swimming pool, national-level courts for badminton, table tennis, and world-class gymnastics facilities, to experiential classrooms that foster creativity and learning, this school is designed for all-round development. The fully equipped music and theatre auditoriums add to the rich learning experience, creating an environment where students can thrive. I have not seen anything like this before! Congratulations to Mukesh Sharma for his incredible vision in creating such a remarkable space for growth and excellence. Very impressive!"

Loved every bit of my interaction with everyone at Prometheus School.

It’s beyond schooling and is bound to be an institution with global standing

I was absolutely thrilled with the exceptional education and nurturing environment provided by Prometheus School . I have visited many schools but have never seen such facilities for sports and extra curriculum activities .

What truly sets Prometheus school apart, however, is the vision and passion of their chairman Mr Mukesh Sharma, who wants to create the next generation of entrepreneurs.

The school's emphasis on overall development of a child keeping  their physical and mental well being as a top priority. The campus is modern, well-maintained, and provides a safe space for students to grow and explore.

I wholeheartedly recommend Prometheus School to any family seeking an exceptional educational experience for their child.

I recently had the privilege of visiting Prometheus School in Noida, and I was thoroughly impressed by its holistic approach to education. The school's founder, Mukesh Sharma, has created a visionary institution that goes beyond academics, nurturing students' natural talents through sports, music, art, and technology.

I have visited many schools across India and abroad and haven’t come across any other school which comes close to the way Prometheus has been designed. They're not just talking about "Learning RE imagined" - they're living it. Every detail, every program, every conversation is centered around creating a transformative educational experience for these students.

The school has facilities to cater to every child’s interest. It only only boasts of some of India’s best sports facilities, but also has an impressive repertoire of additional facilities, such as an auditorium, multiple mini theatres, multiple dance rooms, recording studio, and design thinking workshops.

The moment I stepped out of the school after my visit, my first thought was “I wish we had a school like this for our son when he was growing up.” This school is really the dream for every child and parent. What an amazing institution!!

Yesterday, I had the opportunity to visit Prometheus School where I met with Mukesh Sir and had a tour of the entire campus. The school boasts unparalleled sports facilities coupled with the best coaching staff in Noida. Observing this, one can draw a connection to the school's approach in enhancing its sports culture with the ultimate goal of aiming for the Olympics.

I extend my best wishes and heartfelt thanks to the school for fostering such an exceptional environment.
School looks at holistic development of children and not just studies. Great experience so far

Hello
It is always a pleasure to visit Prometheus school noida , I am always amazed to visit the Prometheus sports arena which is my favourite part of the school specially the world class olympics size swimming pool , badminton academy , table tennis academy , gymnastics academy and the shooting range . One can just name any sport and we have that facility at Prometheus school noida . It is also very much exciting to see international and national level players and champions playing different sports every time we visit the sports arena . I have never seen such a high-tech school in my life .Thank you Mukesh sir ( founder chairperson ) Prometheus school noida for the Wonderfull school tour yesterday and creating such an amazing school and sports arena and your vision to give champions and olympians
For the nation .

Best regards
Bhavya vaid

- A school where your child says ‘I don’t want to change anything about my school, it is perfect!’

- You see the leadership welcoming the kids every morning whether is storming or pouring down

-  A place where children not only cover the curriculum but also learn and develop essential life skills, becoming grounded and well-rounded through initiatives like Project Kripa, which instills the value of giving back to society from an early age

Thank you to the school for helping to nurture our children into confident, resilient, and compassionate global citizens, empowered to unleash their full potential.
Very happy to have selected this school. It has exceeded my expectations in every facet.
